artistContext.name: Noizekid
artistContext.summary: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry. He released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes all of his samples, loops and drums used in various of his works.

writer.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
writer.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer define his career.
writer.author: D. Varela
writer.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry figures. His production style is characterized by a blend of electronic and dancehall elements.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his collaborations with prominent figures in the music industry, including DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
His production style is characterized by a blend of electronic and dancehall elements, which has earned him a distinct position within the Latin electronic music scene.
In collaboration with Barnation, Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack,' a collection that includes all of his samples, loops, and drums used in various works.
His work is further contextualized by associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
